text.title: Distribution Channel Research Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example illustrating the methodology against a realistic input.

example.title: Solopreneur tool launch
example.note: Founder ICP: solo creators in EN-speaking markets. 19-channel catalog scored; rejection log lists 'PR (too slow), Trade Shows (no fit), Sales (no enterprise motion)'. Shortlist: SEO, content, community (r/SaaS + indie communities). Tests run in parallel for 30 days: SEO $500 -> 4200 reach, CAC $28, D30 41%. Content $500 -> 6800 reach, CAC $41, D30 52%. Community $300 -> 800 reach, CAC $12, D30 63%. Verdict: primary=community (best CAC + retention), secondary=SEO (compounding reach). Tripwires: community CAC > $25 for 2 weeks => retest; SEO reach < 2000/mo for 60 days => retest. Content parked: high reach but CAC + payback fail.
